hooks.prompt:
Check if .replit-migrate/ directory exists in the current working directory. If it does:
1. Read .replit-migrate/progress.json if it exists — report brief status (X/Y tasks done, next task)
2. If only scan-report.json exists but no plan, mention: 'Migration scan exists but no plan generated yet. Use migrate_plan_web or migrate_plan_native to generate a plan.'
3. Keep the reminder to ONE line.

If .replit-migrate/ does not exist, check for .replit file. If found, mention: 'This looks like a Replit project. Use migrate_scan to analyze it for migration.'

If neither exists, do nothing.

If .replit-migrate/ exists in the project and you're about to edit a file:
1. Check if this file appears in the migration plan's affected files. If so, remind which migration task applies.
2. If editing an Info.plist and project.yml exists — WARN: 'XcodeGen will overwrite Info.plist on regeneration. Put this property in project.yml instead.'
3. If editing a .swift file and no IBR native scan has been run yet — remind: 'IBR native scan not yet run. Run after this screen is complete.'
Do NOT block the edit — just provide context if relevant.

The Bash command contains 'xcodebuild'. If it also contains 'archive':
1. Check if IBR native scan has been run (look for .ibr/ directory or recent scan results). If not, warn: 'No IBR native scan detected. Lesson: scan from build 1, not build 36.'
2. Check if UISupportedInterfaceOrientations is in project.yml (not just Info.plist). If missing, warn about TestFlight rejection.
3. Check if app icon exists in Assets.xcassets.
Do NOT block — just warn if issues found.
If not an 'archive' command, do nothing (respond with empty string).

The Bash command contains 'altool'. If it also contains 'upload-app':
1. Suggest running bookmark snapshot to preserve session context.
2. Remind to check App Store Connect for processing status.
If not an 'upload-app' command, do nothing (respond with empty string).
